text.title: QA Bug Bash Runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the release scope broad enough to warrant a multi-persona exploratory pass?

conclusion.verdict: skip — single persona; narrow test is enough

text.example: Release v2.4 ships role-management. 4 testers join 60-min session; charters: admin (bulk edit), end-user (profile), integrator (api), perf (load). Observer triages live; raw 38 findings → 31 after dedup; 3 S0, 5 S1, 12 S2, 11 S3. Ledger committed to release/v2.4/bug-bash-ledger.csv; S0/S1 opened as blockers.
